keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $711.44 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $745.40 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Bearish — favor defined-risk spreads.
Use QQQ $711.44 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: TSLA PUT — enter $15.32–$16.94, target $24.20+, stop $9.68.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a softer open with QQQ +0.28% and SPY -0.31%. Composite sentiment -30 (Bearish). The tape is being driven mainly by market breadth (a/d), sector rotation, spy trend. VIX at 15.86 (+1.73%). Environment read: favor defined-risk spreads. Technology (+1.10%) is leading while Industrials (-2.90%) lags. Premarket strength in AVGO, NVDA; weakness in BA, JPM. The desk's highest-conviction setup is TSLA (6.9/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
